title: Session 10: Stage 3 Signal Search â€” Research Complete, Implementation Failed

content.hypothesis: Full agent team can autonomously research, filter, and implement Stage 3 signal candidates
content.method: 6-agent team: strategist wrote signal spec (R1-R5 required, F1-F6 forbidden), researcher identified 5 candidates, team lead adversarially filtered to 2 survivors, engineer assigned implementation
content.result: PARTIAL. Research phase succeeded â€” 2 surviving candidates with concrete formulas. Implementation phase failed â€” harness.py was never modified despite claims. Phase 2 validation produced 0-byte outputs. Contamination check returned all-zero correlations (bogus).

survivors.delta_stability: stability(t) = mean(||phi(t)-phi(t-1)||^2); delta = stability[t] - stability[t-1]; settling -> decrease eta, destabilizing -> increase eta
survivors.delta_correlation: corr(|bare_diff|, push_mag); delta = corr[t] - corr[t-1]; degrading -> decrease eta, improving -> neutral (one-way)

content.key_insight: Temporal derivatives solve direction ambiguity â€” use delta of signal over time, not absolute value
content.contamination_check: Both signals require |corr(signal, mean(resp_z))| < 0.7 to confirm independence from resp_z family
content.root_cause: Agent teammates hallucinated file modifications â€” claimed harness.py was modified but it was not. Background Python processes produced 0-byte outputs.
